result.evidence_summary: An official website provides detailed event information including race distance, fees, start time, and location at Crescent Lake Sno-Park, Oregon. A registration page on getmeregistered.com shows categories for the 23K Nordic Ski race with on-site registration available. Additional mentions appear on Sporthill.com (2019 event) and XC Oregon event listing (scheduled for February 23, 2025, after a hiatus).
